channel.title: Non-covalent interactions; Hydrogen bonding; pi center dot center dotcenter dot pi stacking; Antimicrobial activity; DFT calculations on LMI

item.title: Synthesis, crystal structure, antimicrobial screening and densityfunctional theory calculation of nickel(II), cobalt(II) and zinc(II)mononuclear Schiff base complexes
